function getMirror(c) {
    const charCode = c.charCodeAt(0);

    // Check for lowercase letters ('a' = 97, 'z' = 122)
    if (charCode >= 97 && charCode <= 122) {
        const pos = charCode - 97; // 0 to 25
        const mirroredPos = 25 - pos;
        return String.fromCharCode(97 + mirroredPos);
    }

    // Check for digits ('0' = 48, '9' = 57)
    if (charCode >= 48 && charCode <= 57) {
        const digit = parseInt(c); // 0 to 9
        const mirroredDigit = 9 - digit;
        return String(mirroredDigit);
    }

    // Should not happen based on problem description
    return c; 
}
